title: Historiography
summary: Study how historians have argued about method, scale, narrative, class, memory, and objectivity across major schools of historical writing.
learningObjectives: Compare major schools such as Rankean history, Annales, Marxist history, and postmodern approaches
Explain how historical writing is shaped by scale, archive choices, and narrative form
Assess how historiographical commitments change what counts as evidence and explanation
masteryCriteria: Pass the historiography test at 80 percent or above
